## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] All CI checks pass (quality, tests, build)
- [ ] TypeScript: zero errors (`pnpm -C <project> exec tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] New/changed logic has unit tests
- [ ] SESSION_LOG.md updated with changes
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed

## Docs / Notion updates

- [ ] Updated relevant docs in /docs (if needed)
- [ ] Updated/created ADR (if architecture decision)
- [ ] Linked Notion Feature / Milestone
